explanation: Applied torch.compile with mode='max-autotune' to the GPT model right after construction. This preserves the training loop and model behavior while enabling compiler-driven kernel selection and fusion for better steady-state throughput.

changes.description: Wrap the GPT model with torch.compile using max-autotune before passing it to the trainer.
changes.new_snippet:
model = GPT(config.model)
    model = torch.compile(model, mode='max-autotune') # profine: torch.compile_max_autotune

warnings: First iteration will be significantly slower due to compilation.
Compilation may trigger graph breaks or recompilation if unsupported ops or dynamic shapes are encountered.
